body:
terraswallows:

I don’t usually post about things like this, it’s not the kind of content I want on my blog, but this is something I can’t stay quiet about.

What’s being discussed here is genuinely disturbing. The people responsible should be ashamed of themselves. This isn’t something that can just be brushed aside or ignored.

Reading this made me feel sick. It made me angry. It even brought me to tears. No one should ever be subjected to something like this, ever.

“The Trump administration admits to testing conversion therapy on trans prisoners and implies its policy of forcibly detransitioning trans men in prisons is aimed at preserving their fertility.”

You can read the article yourself, reblog it to show that this kind of thing is not acceptable.


https://transitics.substack.com/p/the-trump-administration-admits-to
